title: pelargonium × abutiloides
intro: Pelargonium × abutiloides, also known as the Copper Canyon daisy or Barberton daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × abutiloides include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures.
